titleStmt.title: SII 28.48: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 48. (A.R. No. 47 of 1913.) SIVĀYAM, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Śivapurīśvara Temple, central shrine, north wall of the kitchen.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa (III) Year 19, Tulā, ba. 7, Tuesday, PunarpUśam = 1196 A.D., October 15.

summary.p: Says that this record was inscribed on stone in the tiru-kkaṭṭaḷai when the tirukkaṭṭaḷai of Viṉāyaka-Piḷḷaiyār in the temple of Tiruvālīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyanār was reconstructed (iṟakki-chcheygaiyil).

Records the undertaking given by five of the śivabrāhmaṇas as having kāṇi in the temple of Tiruvāliśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyanār in Śivapādaśēkharapuram in Kuṟunagar-nāḍu in Rāja-gambhīra-vaḷanāḍu to provide 10 betel-nuts and one and a quarter paṟṟu of betel-leaves for the daily aḍaikkāy-amudu service of the said God on receiving 2 kaḻañju of tuḷai-uṟai-śembon endowed for the purpose by Nāvalūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa Uṟantaiyarāyar, a trader (vyāpāri) of this ūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvastiśrī . Uṭaiyār tiruvāliśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyanār koyilil
viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār tirukkaṭṭaḷai Iṟakkic ceyikaiyil Inta tiruk
kaṭṭaḷaiil kalveṭṭiṉapaṭikku veṭṭina śvastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravat
tikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10varuṣam tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapa
kṣattu saptamiyum cevvāk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṉarpūcattunāḷ Irācagampira va
ḷaṉāṭṭu kuṟunakar nāṭṭu civapātacekarapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruvāliśvaramuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil kāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāmmaṇaril kāśyapaṉ Apaiyam pukkān kāḷitāsa
ṉāna panmāheśvara paṭṭaṉum A symbol ‘t’ precedes each of these names.kūttaṉ periyānāṉa Āṭaviṭaṅkapaṭṭaṉum maru
tāṉatiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān tiruvāṭi pokki paṭṭanum A symbol ‘t’ precedes each of these names.pe
yār pocivāci koṇṭāṉ Eḻunūṟṟuva paṭṭaṉum A symbol ‘t’ precedes each of these names.ṉa kampaṉ perumāḷāṉa nāṟpat
teṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr viyāpāri nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ ka
āḷi tātaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kulottuṅka coḻa Uṟantaiyarāyaṟku nā
ṅkaḷ Upaiya pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Inṉāyanāṟku nitta paṭik
ku Aṭaikkāyamutu ceytaruḷa nittappaṭi Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku pattum Ilaiyamutu pa
ṟṟukkālum celuttakkaṭavomāka Ivar pakkal nāṅkaḷ Upaiyaṅ koṇṭa
poṉ kācu kallāl tuḷai Urai cempon Irukaḻañcum Ippon Irukaḻañcum Aṟako
ṇṭu Ikkoyililuṭ kaṭantu pukku paṇiceyvār cantrātittavarai celuttakka
ṭavomāka Ivvubhaiya pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kulottuṅkacoḻa
Uṟaintaiyarāyaṟku Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civaprammaṇar Ivaṉai
vom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ivvupaiya brāmāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr matdhyaya
staṉ marutūruṭaiyāṉ centāmaraik kaṇṇaṉ perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku kāsyapaṉ Apaiyampukkāṉ kāḷitāsaṉāṉa paṉmāheśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kūttaṉ periyāṉāṉa Āṭaviṭaṅka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Impression containing of lines 24-26 missing. This is as per old transcript. marutāṉtīśvaramuṭaiyāṉ tiruvāṭpokki paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku periyāṉ
pocivāci koṇṭāṉāṉa Eḻunūṟṟuva paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kampaṉ perumāḷāṉa
nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 28.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
